author: G. A. Antcliffe
title: Effective Mass and Spin Splitting in Hg1-xCdxTe
composition_methods: relative spectral response; Cd-115 radioactive tracer analyses
notes: Six Table I specimens are numerically tabulated; Q224-25 and Q115-15 are named figure examples; total experimental specimen count is not reported. The paper also reports a photoconductive 50 percent relative-response threshold at 77 K and a 4.2 K threshold-derived gap proxy.
